headline: After Warren Buffett’s Successor’s Q1 Purge, Just 4 Stocks Make Up Over 50% of Berkshire Hathaway
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-B) on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: 70% of Berkshire’s $381 billion portfolio is invested in ... headline: Apple supplier Jabil, Adani partner to build AI data center infra platform in India
summary: Electronics manufacturer Jabil and India's Adani Enterprises on Monday ‌announced a partnership to build an ‌integrated AI and data center infrastructure manufacturing platform ​in the country. The platform will serve the infrastructure needs of global hyperscalers, co-location facilities and enterprise data centers, directly ‌addressing the "explosive" ⁠local and global demand for AI-ready data center hardware, the companies ⁠said. Jabil and Adani added they were working on operational frameworks and formal ​documentation for ​the partnership, ​but did not disclose ‌any financial details.

content.title: Apple supplier Jabil, Adani partner to build AI data center infra platform in India
content.summary: Electronics manufacturer Jabil and India's Adani Enterprises on Monday ‌announced a partnership to build an ‌integrated AI and data center infrastructure manufacturing platform ​in the country. The platform will serve the infrastructure needs of global hyperscalers, co-location facilities and enterprise data centers, directly ‌addressing the "explosive" ⁠local and global demand for AI-ready data center hardware, the companies ⁠said. Jabil and Adani added they were working on operational frameworks and formal ​documentation for ​the partnership, ​but did not disclose ‌any financial details.

headline: Is Apple (AAPL) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Apple (AAPL) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Apple (AAPL) Stock Fair Value Edges Higher As AI And Siri Plans Draw Split Views
summary: The updated fair value estimate for Apple now sits at US$312.72, a small move from US$310.51 that reflects only modest shifts in the underlying model. This adjustment comes as analysts debate how quickly Apple can convert its AI roadmap, upgraded Siri plans, and ecosystem strengths into earnings power, with targets across the Street ranging from the high US$200s to the high US$300s. As you read on, you will see what is driving those different views and how to track this evolving narrative...

headline: Rising Memory Costs Test Apple Margins As AI Demands More Hardware
summary: Apple reports that rising global memory chip prices are creating fresh pressure on hardware costs as AI features raise technical requirements. Upcoming AI upgrades, including a more capable Siri, are expected to require more device memory than many current Apple products include. Management indicates that higher memory expenses could weigh on gross margins and profitability over the coming quarters. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:AAPL, this cost issue comes at a time when the stock is...
